message:
fix(web-ui): use insert_system_agent for HumanOverseer to fix 500 error

handle_overseer_send called register_agent("HumanOverseer", ...) but
register_agent validates names against the adjective+noun vocabulary
(e.g. BlueLake, RedFox). "HumanOverseer" fails this validation, causing
a 500 Internal Server Error when sending messages via the Human Overseer
web UI button.

Switched to insert_system_agent which bypasses name validation — this
function already exists and is used by the ACK TTL escalation worker
for similar system-level agent names (e.g. "OpsEscalation").

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
